prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait photo of a young Korean woman lying on her side in a lush field of white daisies and tall green grass. She wears a soft light gray dress with delicate ruffles and sheer long sleeves, the fabric gently wrinkled and flowing naturally over her curled body. Compose her in a relaxed, intimate pose with one arm folded near her face, body slightly curled, long straight dark brown hair spread across the grass and lightly tousled by the breeze. Shot close from above at a slight angle, with daisies in the foreground and background, some flowers softly crossing the frame for depth. Use golden hour natural sunlight with warm soft tones, realistic highlights on hair and fabric, gentle shadows, dreamy ethereal atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, film photography color grading, soft contrast, high detail, 85mm lens, f/1.8, 4k, ultra realistic. The face should look natural and highly detailed with realistic skin texture and calm peaceful expression, looking softly toward the camera. Avoid artificial smoothing, plastic skin, over-sharpening, distorted hands, extra limbs, harsh flash, cartoon style, and unrealistic colors.
